author: maxine--tui-startup-sync
content: Plan: Three sync features for the TUI (REQ-3, AC-7/AC-8/AC-9): (1) Startup sync in run() before App::new() — SyncManager::fetch() + hydrate_to_sqlite() with 'Syncing...' message before alternate screen. (2) Periodic 30s background sync via mpsc channel (same pattern as agents_tab). (3) Global 'r' keybinding intercepted before tab dispatch triggers full sync. Per-tab 'r' handlers delegate to global. ':r' command palette remains as local disk refresh. Key files: tui/mod.rs (main), plus all 5 tab files.
